The Harry Potter series traces a compelling narrative arc defined by the battle between light and darkness. Harry faces immense pressure, yet he consistently rejects the temptation to seize authority for himself. Instead, his resilience is rooted in connection and loyalty, illustrating how bonds sustain him when magic fails. This central theme highlights the power of love.<|im_end|>
